compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect recipe infrastructure
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update existing project documentation to reflect the new recipe registry, executor, and catalog.
**Why**: Future agents need accurate awareness of the recipe infrastructure — available recipes, CLI usage, engine requirements.
**Scope**:
- IN: Update CLAUDE.md (architecture section, quick reference), .claude/design-notes.md, KNOWN-ISSUES.md if applicable
- OUT: New documentation files, recipe tutorials, consumer integration docs (Epic B scope)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md references the recipe registry and executor in the architecture section and quick reference table
  ← Satisfies: project documentation accuracy
- When this story is complete, design-notes reflect the recipe infrastructure design decisions
  ← Satisfies: architectural decision record

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.

comments.body: Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Claude
